identity.mission: Create a high-performance, aesthetically unique SaaS integrations marketplace.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Notion's clean utility with Linear's dark elegance.
Emotion First: The page should feel 'powerful' and 'connected'.
Content is King: Logos and status are the heroes.
Contrast: High contrast between the dark slate background and the vibrant orange accent.

PageContainer.description: Full-screen dark container with specific background color.
PageContainer.classes: min-h-screen bg-[#0F1720] text-white flex flex-col md:flex-row

Sidebar.description: Left navigation for categories. Fixed on desktop, hidden on mobile (replaced by dropdown).
Sidebar.styling: border-r border-[#243140] bg-[#0F1720] p-6 hidden md:block
Sidebar.item_styling: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors text-[#94A3B8] hover:text-white hover:bg-[#141C26]

MobileNav.description: Dropdown or horizontal scroll for categories on mobile.
MobileNav.styling: md:hidden p-4 border-b border-[#243140] bg-[#0F1720] sticky top-0 z-20

MainContent.description: Right side area containing search and grid.

Header.description: Contains Page Title, Total Count, and Search Bar.
Header.styling: flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center mb-8 gap-4

SearchBar.styling: bg-[#141C26] border border-[#243140] text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 w-full md:w-80 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF6A00] focus:border-[#FF6A00] placeholder-gray-500

IntegrationCard.description: The main unit of the grid.
IntegrationCard.styling: group bg-[#141C26] border border-[#243140] rounded-xl p-6 flex flex-col items-start gap-4 hover:border-[#FF6A00] transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden

LogoContainer.description: White rounded square for Clearbit logos to ensure visibility on dark bg.
LogoContainer.styling: w-12 h-12 bg-white rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm shrink-0

StatusBadge.styling: text-xs font-semibold px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full inline-flex items-center gap-1.5

ConnectButton.styling: mt-auto w-full py-2 px-4 bg-[#FF6A00] hover:bg-[#E55F00] text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-full transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2

integrations.name: Gmail
integrations.description: Sync emails and calendar events directly.

integrations.name: BambooHR
integrations.description: HR software for small and medium businesses.

integrations.name: Notion
integrations.description: All-in-one workspace for notes and docs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Clearbit Logo' URL pattern: https://logo.clearbit.com/{domain}
CRITICAL: Maintain the existing 'openMergeLink()' function for the connection action. Do not break existing business logic.
CRITICAL: Preserve OAuth flows for Gmail and Outlook.
Use the exact hex codes provided for the dark theme. Do not use generic Tailwind 'gray-900'.
Ensure the layout is responsive: Sidebar on desktop, Dropdown on mobile.
Add a 'connected' state visual: Green border glow + 'Connected' badge.
The search bar should filter the integrations list in real-time.
Display a 'Total Connected' count in the header area.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'integration-card-hubspot', 'connect-btn-hubspot').
CODEBASE IS JS: Write code in .js and .jsx files. Do not use TypeScript types.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for the main background; use the solid #0F1720.
Use 'Inter' or 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for the body text if available in tokens.
Ensure accessibility: Text contrast on the #141C26 card background must be high.
Motion: Add subtle hover effects to cards (translate-y, border color change).
